title: BEM-843 route after 842
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-23 | 14:33 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem842_verify_after_bem841_tick.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
if ps=='triad_present':
    status='process_real_claude_response_next'
    next_action='read real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif ps=='real_response_still_missing' or missing==['real_claude_response']:
    status='patch_claude_response_writer_next'
    next_action='patch Claude dispatcher prompt/action so it writes real response to claude_to_gpt, then retry'
elif ps=='dispatch_results_missing_after_bem841' or 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    status='repair_dispatch_results_next'
    next_action='repair workflow_dispatch_results writer/processor'
elif ps=='runtime_missing_after_bem841' or 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='repair_runtime_state_next'
    next_action='patch Claude dispatcher runtime state writer/workflow target'
else:
    status='diagnose_unknown_bem842_next'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-842 unknown status'
state={'bem':'BEM-843','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem843_route_after_bem842.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem843_route_after_bem842.md').write_text('# BEM-843 | Route After BEM-842 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-843'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem843_route_after_bem842.json','governance/reports/bem843_route_after_bem842.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-842 proof verification to the next exact repair step')
